verses.1: I will sing of loving kindness and justice.
verses.2: I will be careful to live a blameless life.
verses.3: I will set no vile thing before my eyes.
verses.4: A perverse heart will be far from me.
verses.5: I will silence whoever secretly slanders his neighbor.
verses.6: My eyes will be on the faithful of the land,
verses.7: He who practices deceit won’t dwell within my house.
verses.8: Morning by morning, I will destroy all the wicked of the land,
